testcase.name: test_get_candidates_returns_prior

failure.message: AssertionError: prior f94712b5-6262-42bc-b777-66daee61e4da not in candidates [] assert 'f94712b5-6262-42bc-b777-66daee61e4da' in []

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase7_lifecycle.py:200: in test_get_candidates_returns_prior assert prior_sid in pids, f"prior {prior_sid} not in candidates {pids}" E AssertionError: prior f94712b5-6262-42bc-b777-66daee61e4da not in candidates [] E assert 'f94712b5-6262-42bc-b777-66daee61e4da' in []

testcase.name: test_resume_matching_identity_succeeds
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase7_lifecycle.py:217: in test_resume_matching_identity_succeeds assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Identity keys do not match — cross-user resume denied"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
